subject_pr.title: feat(log): implement unified random log sampling system
subject_pr.author: haoxianghz
subject_pr.note: issue comments are recreated CI/mirror posts by one account; the 163 review comments are the seeded [severity][category] decision corpus.

upstream_origin.title: feat(log): implement unified random log sampling system

derived.decision_signal_note: 44 explicit findings hidden among 325 #6 artifacts → you read 100% to find 13.5%.
derived.no_single_index_note: Decisions are distributed across review threads and 30 files with no merge-readiness summary; reconstructing the decision log requires reading the whole thread.

method.fix_ack_regex: 已修复|已修改|已解决|已优化|已调整|fixed|resolved|done
method.reading_model: Latin words @200 wpm + CJK chars @400 cpm (stated estimate)
caveats: #6 issue comments are recreated CI/mirror posts by a single account; participant/human-involvement metrics are taken from the UPSTREAM original !1064.
Decision detection is [severity]-tag based on #6's seeded review corpus; approximate.
review_submissions(163) are 1:1 COMMENTED wrappers of the 163 inline review comments and are NOT double-counted in discussion_artifacts.
Reading-time is a coarse estimate from the stated word/char rates.
